transcript.text: Hello, Astha ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 12 April 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 2 Adult, 2 Child ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha aapko ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
हां, यार। थोड़ी एक्सपेंसिव लग रही थी टिकट। तो, मैं देख रही हूं।
Haan, total ₹4796 rupees hain. Kya koi specific concern hai?
Namanala na ki the mahangi the kit s.
Achcha, theek hai. Main aapko is par ek discount offer kar sakti hoon. Kya aap 10% discount chahenge?
Theek hai, maine 10% discount apply kar diya hai. Ab aapka total ho gaya hai ₹4316. Maine updated link aapko SMS pe bhej diya
Abhi filhaal koi card discount to available nahi hai, but jo 10% discount maine aapko offer kiya hai, woh aap use kar sakte hain. Kya main booking ke sath aage badhoon?
Great! Maine booking link aapko SMS pe bhej diya hai. Aap wahan se complete kar lijiye. Have a great day!
